prompt: A Japanese-style minimalist instruction manual for meditation techniques, featuring clean line drawings, zen calligraphy, and plenty of white space
prompt_refined: An image of a minimalist Japanese instruction manual page detailing meditation techniques. The design features clean, precise line drawings illustrating the postures and steps, combined with elegant Zen calligraphy. The layout prioritizes an abundance of white space, creating a calm, uncluttered, and serene aesthetic.
